backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that wires together authorization and blob-storage mixins, and exposes CRUD endpoints for Poetry, Dua, Song, and UserRecord types, plus admin initialization and maintenance-mode controls.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the admin authorization fix for the UsersControlsPanel 'Failed to load users' error to the file frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts and listing the relevant components and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a pre-built reference for build planning and code navigation.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for the light and dark color themes (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app titled 'Dard-e-munasif' that mounts the React root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for Login, Mix, Poetry, Dua, Songs, and Admin pages, wrapped in a ThemeProvider and global Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/ContentMan: An admin panel component that lists all poetry, duas, and songs with the ability to delete items after a confirmation dialog, with loading skeletons and refresh support.
frontend/src/components/admin/DuaUploadF: An admin form component for uploading a new Dua with title, content, and optional audio file, showing upload progress and resetting on success.
frontend/src/components/admin/PoetryUplo: An admin form component for uploading new poetry with title, content, and an optional image file, tracking upload progress and resetting fields on success.
frontend/src/components/admin/SongUpload: A React form component for uploading songs with title, artist, and audio file fields, using the useCreateSong mutation and ExternalBlob for upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/components/admin/UsersContr: An admin panel component for managing users (block/unblock) and toggling maintenance mode, with search filtering and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/AudioPlayer.tsx: Reusable audio player component with play/pause, seek slider, AudioContext focus management, MediaSession integration, enforced unmuted full-volume playback, and a permission-denied guard UI.
frontend/src/components/BanScreen.tsx: Full-screen overlay shown to blocked users, displaying a suspension message and a WhatsApp deep-link button to contact the admin.
frontend/src/components/DuaPost.tsx: Card component for a single Dua post featuring a time-ago label, optimistic like button, share via Web Share API, copy-to-clipboard, and audio download functionality.
frontend/src/components/FullScreenPostMo: A full-screen modal component for displaying Poetry or Dua posts, supporting image display, audio playback, like count, history tracking, scroll locking, and Escape key dismissal.
frontend/src/components/HamburgerMenu.ts: A slide-out hamburger menu panel that displays browsing history and downloaded audio entries, with playback and delete controls for downloads.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app layout component that handles credential-based auth redirects, ban/maintenance checks via the backend actor, and renders the navigation bar with theme toggle and hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/MaintenanceScree: A full-screen overlay component shown when the app is in maintenance mode, displaying an animated wrench icon and a message from the developer.
A full-screen music player modal that auto-plays a selected Song, provides play/pause and seek controls, tracks history, and handles audio permission denial states.
frontend/src/components/PINAuthGuard.tsx: A PIN-based authentication guard for the admin panel that validates a hardcoded PIN, persists session state in sessionStorage, and stores the admin token for use by the admin actor.
frontend/src/components/PoetryPost.tsx: A card component for displaying a poetry post with like, download, share, and copy actions, plus a full-screen modal view and auto-refreshing timestamp.
frontend/src/components/SongPost.tsx: A card component for displaying a song post with inline play/pause, like, share, and copy actions, plus a now-playing modal and auto-refreshing timestamp.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor instance, initializing admin access control from a URL parameter and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminActor.ts: A thin wrapper around useActor that re-exports the same actor under an admin alias, since the base actor already handles admin token initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioPlayback.ts: A singleton-based audio playback hook managing a global HTMLAudioElement with play/pause/seek controls, wake lock, MediaSession metadata, and permission handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useDownloads.ts: A hook for managing offline audio downloads using IndexedDB, exposing add, delete, play, and refresh operations with ready-state gating.
frontend/src/hooks/useHistory.ts: A hook for tracking playback history in IndexedDB, providing addHistoryEntry and refreshHistory functions with automatic timestamping.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: A React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication using @dfinity/auth-client, exposing login/logout, identity state, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating poetry, dua, and song data via backend actors, including read queries and like/create mutations with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useWebAudioFilters.ts: Stub hook that previously managed a Web Audio filter chain but now returns no-ops, as audio playback was simplified to direct HTMLAudioElement usage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/utility layers, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and typography classes for Urdu/Nastaliq and poetry content.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider, InternetIdentityProvider, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin panel page protected by PINAuthGuard, providing tabbed UI for uploading poetry/dua/songs, managing existing content, and controlling users.
frontend/src/pages/DuaPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays all duas in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons, error alerts with retry, and an empty-state message.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login/registration page that collects a user's name, generates a device fingerprint, lets them select a server, and registers them via the backend before redirecting to home.
frontend/src/pages/MixPage.tsx: Main feed page that combines poetry, dua, and songs into a chronologically sorted, filterable list, and displays the logged-in user's unique identity code.
frontend/src/pages/PoetryPage.tsx: Displays a paginated grid of poetry posts fetched via React Query, handling loading skeletons, error alerts with retry, and empty state.
frontend/src/pages/SongsPage.tsx: Displays a paginated grid of song posts fetched via React Query, handling loading skeletons, error alerts with retry, and empty state.
frontend/src/utils/indexedDB.ts: Provides IndexedDB helpers to initialize the database and perform CRUD operations on browsing history and downloaded content stores.
frontend/src/utils/timeAgo.ts: Converts an Internet Computer nanosecond timestamp (bigint) into a human-readable relative time string such as '3 days ago'.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters from both regular and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and hash cleanup.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom OKLCH-based color tokens, typography/container-query/animate plugins, Urdu font family, and accordion keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, known issues, and existing feature fix requests, specifically noting an admin authorization failure in UsersControlsPanel.
